tasks.subject: Task 1: Write baseline test scenarios (RED phase)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document expected vs. actual Claude behavior without HPC skills for three representative prompts.

**Files:**
- Create: `docs/superpowers/tests/hpc-skill-baselines.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Four scenarios documented (new project beginner, add component expert, ambiguous experience, verb transition)
- [ ] Baseline behavior recorded for Scenarios A and C

**Verify:** `test -f docs/superpowers/tests/hpc-skill-baselines.md`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/superpowers/tests/hpc-skill-baselines.md"], "verifyCommand": "test -f docs/superpowers/tests/hpc-skill-baselines.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Four scenarios documented", "Baseline behavior recorded for A and C"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Write shared/experience-infer.md
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Shared hybrid experience-inference skill that all HPC verb routers invoke.

**Files:**
- Create: `skills/hpc/shared/experience-infer.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Valid YAML frontmatter
- [ ] Signal → level mapping table
- [ ] Dot flowchart
- [ ] One confirmation question template
- [ ] Under 400 words

**Verify:** `wc -w skills/hpc/shared/experience-infer.md`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["skills/hpc/shared/experience-infer.md"], "verifyCommand": "wc -w skills/hpc/shared/experience-infer.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Valid YAML frontmatter", "Signal table present", "Dot flowchart present", "Under 400 words"]}
```

**Acceptance Criteria:**

- [ ] No unresolved loopholes

tasks.subject: Task 8: Set up scheduled staleness agent
tasks.description:

**Files:**
- No new files

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Agent configured with weekly cadence
- [ ] Dry-run modifies only Stale Signals section

tasks.subject: Task 9: Final commit and push
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Clean working tree, all files committed, pushed to remote.

**Files:**
- All files in skills/hpc/ and docs/

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Clean working tree
- [ ] All commits pushed to origin/main

**Verify:** `git log --oneline origin/main | head -10`

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "git log --oneline origin/main | head -10", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Clean working tree", "All commits pushed"]}
```
